chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 05 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.33/2025 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.34/2025 20.04.2026 On 15.04.2026, following order was passed: “15.04.2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel is unable to articulate questions of law. At his request, to come up on 20.04.2026. Today despite fixed applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011 Judge Judge Amjad
